subcodes.first_line: O thou who striveth in the service of benevolent endeavors! That speaker who uttereth the praise of God in this divine assembly is indeed remembered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ساعی در خدمت مساعی خیریه آن ناطق بذکر الله در این انجمن رحمانی مذکور و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
